arts.ttl: Arsenal 'favourites' over Chelsea for €85m WONDERKID transfer
arts.sum: Gittens has reportedly been told by Dortmund that he will be allowed to leave this summer despite having three years remaining on his contract, with the German side needing to raise funds if they do not qualify for the Champions League. Arsenal have been among the sides who have closely watched Gittens in recent weeks and, with Dortmund likely to miss out on Champions League football next season, they could be willing to part ways with their young star for around €85 million.

arts.ttl: Chelsea vs Southampton – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Chelsea host struggling Southampton in the Premier League tonight as the Blues look to get their top-four pursuit back on track. Enzo Maresca’s side lost 2-1 at Aston Villa on Saturday, a result that extended their record to two wins in 10 Premier League games. arts.ttl: Chelsea fans want high-profile sporting director at their club, his recruitment record is insane
arts.sum: They've had enough of Paul Winstanley and Laurence Stewart!

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca has three weeks to save Chelsea season amid top four crisis and sack pressure
arts.sum: Yet, close your other eye, turn the head again, and Chelsea could easily find themselves only once place behind Arsenal by the time they have played two more league games. For 20 minutes against Aston Villa, Chelsea showed the fight and grit at a Tough Place To Go of a side who, in contrast to previous weeks, actually felt and played like they could still make something of this season and it wasn't all happening to them.

arts.ttl: What Cole Palmer did to wow Enzo Maresca as transfer question asked over Chelsea star
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca has continued to back Cole Palmer with the Chelsea attacker going through a bit of a drought in front of goal. With 39 goals and 21 assists in 74 appearances across all competitions, there has become a reliance on Palmer to perform from a Blues' point of view - something Maresca spoke about on Monday morning, suggesting there was too much responsibility on the England international's shoulders.
